stats.label: of diets fail within a year

keyPoints.title: 🔍 Education Before Restriction
keyPoints.text: Instead of cutting out foods, I help you understand what your body truly needs. We identify what isn’t working in your current eating patterns.

keyPoints.title: 🎯 Sustainable Habits
keyPoints.text: We build habits that become part of who you are, not just what you do for 12 weeks. No more relying on willpower alone.

analogy.title: Your Body is a Machine
analogy.text: Just like you wouldn’t put cheap fuel in a Ferrari, why fuel your body with foods that don’t serve its needs?

cta.title: Ready to Break the Diet Cycle?
cta.text: Let’s build habits that truly last

PhilosophyFullPage.heroSubtitle: Breaking the Diet Cycle for Good
PhilosophyFullPage.problemHighlight2: This approach fails because it treats symptoms, not causes.
PhilosophyFullPage.problemText: After years of processed foods and unconscious eating, we've lost touch with how nutrition truly affects our bodies. We're so used to nutrient-poor foods that we don't even notice how they make us feel sluggish, tired, and unsatisfied.
PhilosophyFullPage.approachIntro: Instead of starting with restriction, I believe in starting with awareness. My philosophy centers on three core principles:

1.title: Identify the Root Cause
1.text: Before making any changes, we need to understand what's really wrong with your current diet. You can't fix what you don't understand.

2.title: Treat Your Body Like a Machine
2.text: Your body is an incredible machine that requires the right fuel to function optimally. Just like you wouldn't put cheap gas in a Ferrari, why fuel your body with foods that don't serve its needs?

3.title: Lifestyle Integration
3.text: Sustainable nutrition isn't about following a diet for 12 weeks—it's about building eating habits that become part of who you are. It's a lifelong journey of learning and adaptation.

educationSection.title: The Power of Nutrition Education
educationSection.content: Understanding the 'why' and 'how' of nutrition empowers you to make better choices. My role is to provide you with the knowledge and tools you need to take charge of your health.

testimonials.name: John Doe
testimonials.statement: I never understood how my diet was affecting my life until I started working with [Your Name]. The education I received was a game changer.

testimonials.name: Jane Smith
testimonials.statement: This is not just another diet plan. It's a complete shift in mindset and habits. I've never felt better.

cta.title: Are You Ready to Transform Your Relationship with Food?
cta.text: Let's embark on this journey together and break the diet cycle for good.

hero.description: Manage clients, assign personalized packages, track sessions and progress — all in one clean dashboard. Stop juggling spreadsheets and start coaching.

features.heading: A complete toolkit for professional coaches
features.description: Built around the real workflows coaches use every day — not generic project management wrapped in a gym theme.

items.title: Client Management
items.description: A full profile for every client — health history, fitness goals, body metrics, and activity levels in one place.

items.title: Personalized Packages
items.description: Create coaching packages with custom sessions, duration, features, and pricing. Assign them to clients with goals and notes.

items.title: Progress Tracking
items.description: Session bubbles, progress bars, and completion stats so you and your clients always know where they stand.

items.title: Session Scheduling
items.description: Log completed sessions, set targets, and track weekly cadence — without needing a separate calendar tool.

items.title: Coach Notes & Goals
items.description: Attach private notes and custom goals to each client's package. Keep your coaching context organized and accessible.

items.title: Invite-Only Onboarding
items.description: Send invite links to new clients. They fill in their profile, you get notified, and they're immediately in your roster.

howItWorks.heading: Up and running in four steps
howItWorks.description: No onboarding calls required. Most coaches have their first client assigned within a day.

steps.title: Create your coach profile
steps.description: Set up your specialties, training modalities, bio, and availability. Your public profile is what clients see on the marketplace.

steps.title: Build your packages
steps.description: Define coaching packages with session counts, duration, price, and the specific features included. You control the offer.

steps.title: Invite or accept clients
steps.description: Send invite links or get discovery requests from the marketplace. Clients complete their health profile on onboarding.

steps.title: Assign & track
steps.description: Assign a package to each client, add goals and notes, log sessions, and watch progress update in real time.

pricing.heading: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.description: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready.

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: Perfect for coaches just getting started.

plans.name: Pro
plans.description: For coaches ready to scale their business.

items.name: Carlos M.

cta.heading: Ready to run a better coaching business?
cta.description: Join 500+ coaches who replaced spreadsheets and sticky notes with a platform built for them. Free to start, no credit card needed.
